_notes: All three LLMs ran successfully with few-shot prompting on both clean synthetic (30 samples) and synthetic-freeform (35 samples) test sets.

Dominant failure mode across all three: models emit valid Ogham Unicode characters but hallucinate common genealogical formulae (CATTUBUTTAS-MAQI-MUCOI-CORBBI) learned from the few-shot examples, regardless of actual image content.
GPT-4o: most consistent hallucinator — produced identical MAQI-formula outputs across varied test images.
Claude: similar failure, slightly more diverse outputs. 90.64% CER on synth / 109% on freeform.
Gemini: most varied outputs including some forfeda characters (ᚖ) and dots. 110% synth / 85.63% freeform.
CER > 100% indicates predictions are longer than references (hallucinated extra characters).
0% exact match across all three models on both test sets — not a single inscription correctly transcribed in 195 total LLM inferences.
